summary: Made two surgical seam edits: re-anchored the opening on Leela encountering Omar outside Keating so the chapter enters from a distinct physical action rather than another time-stamped setup, and added a light morning-facing line at the end to hand off more cleanly into chapter 7's Research Integrity email.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin at the loading-dock encounter while preserving the same seminar aftermath, June text, and Mohit recollection.
Adjusted the final paragraph to note that the September logs would still be there in the morning, tightening the bridge into the next chapter.
